title: On Certain Ladies
content:
When other fair ones to the shades go down,
Still Chloe, Flavin, Delia, stay in town:
Those ghosts of beauty wandering here reside,
And haunt the places where their honour died.
meaning:
Alexander Pope's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "On Certain Ladies"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
